title: Hayakawa Ryo, Age 15!
overview: As Ryo Hayakawa arrives home from school, the local baseball team begs her to finish pitching their game.

title: A Baseball Team at a Prestigious Girls' School?
overview: The chairwoman at the Kisaragi School for Girls has determined that there will be a girls' baseball team and that they will go to Koshien within three years. Ryo is offered one of the scholarships issued to build this team.

title: In My Father’s Footsteps
overview: Ryo is accepted into Kisaragi School but worried about leaving her mother to run the Oden bar by herself.

title: Welcome, Seira!
overview: Coach Kido has been told that one of their recruits, Seira Morimura, has refused to join the team.

title: Wave Motion Swing!
overview: Coach Kido goes to the Oden bar and shows Ryo a tape of a baseball player with a famous batting technique called the Wave Motion Swing.

title: Catch This!
overview: None of the players can catch Ryo's pitches and so a search for a catcher begins.

title: We Need You, Izumi!
overview: With only two more girls needed to complete the team, Ryo asks Izumi to join and is greeted with scorn.

title: The Future on the Line
overview: Izumi searches for the identity of the mysterious man but gets no answers from her mother's butler or from Coach Kido.

title: Winners & Losers
overview: The day of the contest has arrived. Izumi is near defeat but Ryo can't keep thinking about why she hates her so much.

title: The Kisaragi Nine!
overview: The girls are playing against a junior high team but they are still short one player. The coach introduces Nene in a player's uniform so that they can compete.

title: Aim for Koshien!
overview: Keiko appeals her case to the board directly so that they may let the girls play but is refused again.

title: One Hundred Pitches
overview: In order to get Rinkai High to play them, Keiko told the papers that they must be afraid of their pitcher's magic ball.

title: The Girl Stratagem
overview: The day of the game has arrived. In order to get an advantage over the other team, the girls use their femininity to get to a quick lead.

title: Lightning Ball
overview: Ryo is losing confidence in herself but her teammates continue to do their part in the field.

title: Scandal
overview: With the notoriety of the girls' win, a report digs up information on Ryo's father which begins a scandal.

title: Exile
overview: Ryo knows that she is to be expelled and the team dissolved and so she heads out to her father's hometown.

title: Visions
overview: Hiroki arrives at the orphanage but learns that Ryo is hospitalized after she rescued the kids.

title: The Gift
overview: The Parents' Association has been calling for the baseball team to be dissolved and Principal Mita agrees.

title: Hearts & Diamonds
overview: Coach Kido announces that he has decided to make Ryo the team captain. She learns that Hiroki's birthday is coming up and decides to make him a present.

title: Back in Training
overview: The girls head out to begin their intensive training camp before preliminaries start.

title: I Hate You, Takasugi!
overview: After Izumi's call, Hiroki pays a visit to her to make sure everything is all right.

title: You’re Not Alone, Yuki!
overview: Yuki, brooding over her missing Fifi-chan, remembers how she helped to win the championship in junior high only to be ostracized by her teammates.

title: Beauties vs, the Beasts
overview: The Kisaragi Girls have drawn a dirty-playing team for their first game.

title: The Kiss
overview: The Kisaragi Girls are beating everyone they come up against. Hiroki's grandfather comes to the Oden bar and talks to Ryo.

title: Field of Broken Dreams
overview: It has come down to the semi-finals and it's the Kisaragi girls' team against the boys' team. Ryo is having problems focusing after seeing Hiroki and Izumi kiss.

title: Shine, Princess Nine!
overview: With two outs and the bases loaded at the top of the ninth inning, it's Koharu's bat. Before she goes out Nene shows her a fax from her father that has the Kanji for Wind on it.
